put.description:
Updates an account's avatar by accepting a pre-signed S3 key.
The client is responsible for uploading the image to S3 before calling this endpoint.

Updates an account's banner by accepting a pre-signed S3 key.
The client is responsible for uploading the image to S3 before calling this endpoint.

get.description: Generates a pre-signed URL and temporary key for uploads.
Gets a paginated list of games.
Gets a single game by its ID.
Gets a collection of goalie game logs.
Gets a paginated list of goalie statistics.
Gets a paginated list of info guides.
Gets a single info guide by its ID.
Gets an info guide by tournament ID.
Gets a paginated list of players.
Gets a single player by its ID.
Gets a collection of skater game logs.
Gets a paginated list of skater statistics.
Gets a paginated list of teams.
Gets a single team by its ID.

put.description:
Updates a team's logo by accepting a pre-signed S3 key.
The client is responsible for uploading the image to S3 before calling this endpoint.

Updates a team's banner by accepting a pre-signed S3 key.
The client is responsible for uploading the image to S3 before calling this endpoint.

get.description: Gets a paginated list of tournaments.
Gets a single tournament by its ID.

put.description:
Updates a tournament's logo by accepting a pre-signed S3 key.
The client is responsible for uploading the image to S3 before calling this endpoint.
